SEARCH

Package com.mimecast.robin.queue

package com.mimecast.robin.queue
A persistent queue for storing emails that could not be delivered.

This package provides multiple queue persistence backends for storing messages
that could not be relayed. The queue backend is configured in cfg/queue.json5.

The PersistentQueue is the main class for the persistent queue.
It is used by the server to store emails that could not be delivered.

Supported Backends:

  • MapDB - Lightweight, file-based embedded database (default for production)
  • Redis - High-performance in-memory queue with optional disk persistence
  • MariaDB - Robust SQL-based queue with transaction support
  • PostgreSQL - Enterprise-grade queue with ACID compliance
  • InMemory - In-memory queue for tests (default when all backends disabled)

Backend Selection Priority:

  1. MapDB - if queueMapDB.enabled is true
  2. Redis - if queueRedis.enabled is true
  3. MariaDB - if queueMariaDB.enabled is true
  4. PostgreSQL - if queuePgSQL.enabled is true
  5. InMemory - fallback when all backends are disabled

All backends implement the QueueDatabase interface,
providing FIFO queue operations, size checks, snapshots, and item removal capabilities.

The

invalid reference 
com.mimecast.robin.queue.relay.RelayQueueCron
processes the queue periodically
with configurable retry scheduling for failed deliveries.
See Also:

    Description
    com.mimecast.robin
    The main package for Robin, a versatile MTA Server and Tester.
    com.mimecast.robin.queue.bounce
    Generation of bounce messages for failed email deliveries.
    com.mimecast.robin.queue.relay

  • Class
    Description
    InMemoryQueueDatabase<T extends Serializable>
    In-memory implementation of QueueDatabase for testing or temporary queues.
    MapDBQueueDatabase<T extends Serializable>
    MapDB implementation of QueueDatabase.
    PersistentQueue<T extends Serializable>
    A persistent FIFO queue that delegates to a QueueDatabase implementation.
    QueueDatabase<T extends Serializable>
    Interface for queue database implementations.
    QueueFactory
    Factory for creating QueueDatabase instances based on configuration.
    QueueFiles
    Queue file utilities.
    QueueMariaDB<T extends Serializable>
    MariaDB implementation of QueueDatabase.
    QueuePgSQL<T extends Serializable>
    PostgreSQL implementation of QueueDatabase.
    RedisQueueDatabase<T extends Serializable>
    Redis implementation of QueueDatabase.
    RelayDeliveryResult
    Data class to hold delivery result information for relay sessions.
    RelayDequeue
    RelayDequeue handles the dequeuing and processing of relay sessions from the persistent queue.
    RelayQueueCron
    RelayQueue queue cron job.
    RelaySession
    Relay session.
    RetryScheduler
    Retry scheduler utility class.
    SQLQueueDatabase<T extends Serializable>
    Abstract base class for SQL-based queue database implementations.
    SQLQueueDatabase.DBConfig
    Database configuration holder.
